Class EnrollmentOperatingPurpose

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.EnrollmentOperatingPurpose

    • of

      public static EnrollmentOperatingPurpose of(String value)
      Returns a EnrollmentOperatingPurpose with the given value. For a specific value the returned object will always be a singleton so reference equality is satisfied when the values are the same.
